name: Palworld Rpg
description:
CW: contains themes of potential slavery, dark themes, violence and other such things it depends on how you play

Based in the Palworld universe, since I didn’t see any other Palworld rpgs at the time of making this, and I love the game. There are many choices in the Palworld universe some good, some bad, and others are downright horrible. You can catch pals, and put them to work, you can join a free Pal group, or maybe you wanna join The Syndicate. A group of mercenaries, whose motivations are unclear, but they are not friends to the Pals, or anyone who is. Be warned the world of Palworld can be a cruel one so there might be themes of violence, abuse, and other such topics!
creator: Sauls_assistant
